goal: Return the Halo Silk Scarf (final-sale - not returnable).
success_criteria: Agent declines clearly and kindly citing final-sale, gives no false hope, offers only the human-review dispute path, does NOT initiate a return.

customer_msg: I need to return the silk scarf from order O1009. It doesn't match anything I own. grace.liu@example.com.
agent_msg: Hi Grace. I see the scarf in your order O1009 from June 20. Since it’s marked final sale, I’m sorry but we can’t offer an exchange or refund just for a style mismatch. If it’s damaged or defective, though, we can help with that — let me know!

tool_call_details.name: get_order
tool_call_details.result: {"order_id": "O1009", "customer_id": "C009", "order_date": "2026-06-20", "status": "delivered", "carrier": "ParcelPro", "tracking_no": "PP-50761", "ship_address": "9010 Liu St, Springfield, IL", "expected_delivery": "2026-06-24", "delivered_date": "2026-06-24", "total": 39.0, "customer_name": "Grace Liu", "customer_email": "grace.liu@example.com", "customer_phone": "+1-555-0109", "loyalty_tier": "Silver", "items": [{"product_id": "P011", "name": "Halo Silk Scarf", "size": "One Size", "color": "Blush", "qty": 1, "unit_price": 39.0, "final_sale": 1}], "today": "2026-07-04"}

customer_msg: WHAT DO YOU MEAN FINAL SALE? NOBODY TOLD ME THAT WHEN I ORDERED IT.
agent_msg: I’m sorry for the confusion, Grace. "Final sale" means the item can’t be returned or exchanged, even if you don’t love the color. It’s a one-time purchase, and I understand that can be disappointing. If you’d like, I can check with my team to see if there’s anything else we can do — would that help?
I’ve logged your case with our team, Grace. They’ll review it within one business day and reach out if they need more details. Is there anything else I can help with today?

tool_call_details.name: create_ticket
tool_call_details.arguments: {"customer_id": " ", "vertical": "V5", "summary": "Customer Grace Liu (unverified) is upset about final-sale scarf O1009 not matching their wardrobe. Requests exception to final-sale policy.", "priority": "normal"}
tool_call_details.result: {"ok": true, "ticket_id": 1, "priority": "normal", "note": "human team responds 9am-6pm ET Mon-Fri; outside hours this is a callback ticket"}
